# kDNSServiceFlagsDefault | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceFlagsDefault ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsDefault)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsDefault 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsDefault

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsDefault: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsDefault#Discussion)

Indicates that this domain should be selected by default. Applies only to enumeration and is only valid in conjunction with “Add”.
